top_signals.title: Warsh promises inflation will be a 'thing of the past,' cites 'mistake' of prior policy
top_signals.summary: Warsh pledged Tuesday to "get monetary policy right" and defeat the inflation that has bedeviled the central bank for the past five years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Polymarket Partners With Crypto Firm During World Cup
top_signals.summary: Crypto brokerage Blockchain.com Group Holdings Inc. has partnered with Polymarket to offer prediction markets to its users in time for the World Cup semifinals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Tether leads $7 million round in Pact Labs to boost USAT stablecoin adoption
top_signals.summary: “Pact Labs gives us the rails to make digital dollars designed to be compliant with U.S. regulations," says Tether USAT.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix Early ADR Options Trading Leans to Short-Term Contracts
top_signals.summary: Options on SK Hynix Inc.’s American Depository Receipts began trading on US options exchanges Tuesday, giving traders in the world’s largest derivatives market easier access to the volatile South Korean memory chipmaker.

top_signals.title: SMM 2026 Highlights Maritime Careers, Opportunities
top_signals.summary: On September 3 and 4, the Maritime Career Market will provide an international platform for recruitment, career orientation and knowledge exchange across the maritime industry.The maritime industry is facing a challenge for the future: not only must it transform ships…
